top3.sql:
SELECT m.label, a.element
FROM molecule m
JOIN atom a ON m.molecule_id = a.molecule_id
WHERE m.label LIKE '%carcinogen%' OR m.label LIKE '%Carcinogen%';

SELECT m.label, a.element
FROM molecule m
JOIN atom a ON m.molecule_id = a.molecule_id
WHERE m.label LIKE '%carcinogen%' OR m.label LIKE '%Carcinogen%';

SELECT m.label, a.element
FROM molecule m
JOIN atom a ON m.molecule_id = a.molecule_id
WHERE LOWER(m.label) LIKE '%carcinogen%';

SELECT DISTINCT m.label, a.element
FROM molecule m
JOIN atom a ON m.molecule_id = a.molecule_id
WHERE m.label LIKE '%carcinogen%' 
   OR m.label LIKE '%Carcinogen%' 
   OR m.label LIKE '%Carcinogenic%' 
   OR m.label LIKE '%carcinogenic%';

SELECT m.label, a.element
FROM molecule m
JOIN atom a ON m.molecule_id = a.molecule_id
WHERE m.label LIKE '%carcinogen%' OR m.label LIKE '%Carcinogen%';

SELECT m.label, a.element
FROM molecule m
JOIN atom a ON m.molecule_id = a.molecule_id
WHERE LOWER(m.label) LIKE '%carcinogen%';

SELECT DISTINCT m.label, a.element
FROM molecule m
JOIN atom a ON m.molecule_id = a.molecule_id
WHERE m.label LIKE '%carcinogen%' 
   OR m.label LIKE '%Carcinogen%' 
   OR m.label LIKE '%Carcinogenic%' 
   OR m.label LIKE '%carcinogenic%';

final.sql:
SELECT m.label, a.element
FROM molecule m
JOIN atom a ON m.molecule_id = a.molecule_id
WHERE m.label LIKE '%carcinogen%' OR m.label LIKE '%Carcinogen%';
